sub_modules.fft16_addr_gen: Combinational radix-2 DIT stage address and twiddle-index generator for the 16-point iterative schedule.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with FFT and IFFT twiddle sign support.
